vocabulary.translation: Don't forget to turn off the air conditioner.

vocabulary.example: 他出门的时候忘关窗户了。
vocabulary.translation: He forgot to close the window when he went out.

vocabulary.example: 请随手关灯，不要浪费电。
vocabulary.translation: Please turn off the lights as you go — don't waste electricity.
Don't sleep with the air conditioner on.

vocabulary.example: 请随手关灯，不要浪费电。
vocabulary.translation: Please turn off the lights as you go — don't waste electricity.

vocabulary.example: 你能帮我把窗户关上吗？
vocabulary.translation: Can you help me close the window?

vocabulary.example: 你顺便帮我把门关了吧。
vocabulary.translation: While you're at it, please close the door for me.

vocabulary.example: 你顺便帮我把门关了吧。
vocabulary.translation: While you're at it, please close the door for me.

vocabulary.example: 请随手关灯，不要浪费电。
vocabulary.translation: Please turn off the lights as you go — don't waste electricity.

vocabulary.example: 我们要节约用电，不要开着空调睡觉。
vocabulary.translation: We should save electricity — don't sleep with the air conditioner on.

vocabulary.example: 请随手关灯，不要浪费电。
vocabulary.translation: Please turn off the lights as you go — don't waste electricity.

vocabulary.english: Turn off the lights as you go
Help me while you're at it

key_sentences.pinyin: Bié wàng le bǎ kōng tiáo guān le.
key_sentences.english: Don't forget to turn off the air conditioner.

key_sentences.chinese: 请随手关灯，不要浪费电。
key_sentences.pinyin: Qǐng suí shǒu guān dēng, bú yào làng fèi diàn.
key_sentences.english: Please turn off the lights as you go — don't waste electricity.

key_sentences.chinese: 你能帮我把窗户关上吗？
key_sentences.pinyin: Nǐ néng bāng wǒ bǎ chuāng hu guān shàng ma?
key_sentences.english: Can you help me close the window?

key_sentences.chinese: 我们要节约用电，不要开着空调睡觉。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men yào jié yuē yòng diàn, bú yào kāi zhe kōng tiáo shuì jiào.
key_sentences.english: We should save electricity — don't sleep with the air conditioner on.

key_sentences.chinese: 你顺便帮我把门关了吧。
key_sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shùn biàn bāng wǒ bǎ mén guān le ba.
key_sentences.english: While you're at it, please close the door for me.

key_sentences.chinese: 他出门的时候忘关窗户了。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā chū mén de shí hòu wàng guān chuāng hu le.
key_sentences.english: He forgot to close the window when he went out.

grammar_points.title: 把字句（1）— The Bǎ-sentence
grammar_points.explanation: Subject + 把 + Object + Verb + Complement. The object is moved before the verb using 把 to emphasise what was done to it. The verb must have a complement (了, 开, 上, etc.) — bare verbs are not used. 把空调关了 = turn off the air conditioner. 把门开开 = open the door.

examples.pinyin: Qǐng bǎ kōng tiáo guān le.
examples.english: Please turn off the air conditioner.

examples.pinyin: Tā bǎ chuāng hu kāi kāi le.

exercises.question: Fill in: 请___空调关了。(Please turn off the air conditioner.)
What must follow the verb in a 把-sentence?
exercises.correct: A complement (like 了, 开, 上)
options: A complement (like 了, 开, 上)

exercises.question: What does 把门开开 mean?
Choose the correct 把-sentence: 'She put the bag down.'
option_pinyin: Tā bǎ bāo fàng xià le.
Bǎ tā bāo fàng xià le.
Tā bāo bǎ fàng xià le.
exercises.correct_pinyin: Tā bǎ bāo fàng xià le.

grammar_points.title: 句末「了2」— Sentence-final 了
grammar_points.explanation: 了 at the end of a sentence signals a change of state or new situation. 下雨了 = It's raining now (it wasn't before). 空调开着了 = The air conditioner is on now. This is different from 了(1) which marks completion after a verb.

exercises.question: What does the sentence-final 了 signal?
exercises.correct: A change of state or new situation
options: A change of state or new situation
A completed action in the past

exercises.question: Which 了 signals a new situation: 他买了书 vs 天黑了?
Fill in: 天气冷___，快把窗户关上吧。(It's gotten cold — close the window.)
What does 他走了 mean?
exercises.correct: He has left / He's gone now
options: He has left / He's gone now

exercises.question: Which sentence shows a change of state?

grammar_points.title: 别...了 — Don't...anymore
grammar_points.explanation: 别 + Verb (+ 了) = Don't / Stop doing something. 别忘了 = Don't forget. 别说了 = Stop talking. 别浪费了 = Stop wasting. The 了 adds a 'stop/anymore' nuance. It is stronger than 不要 when giving warnings or reminders.

examples.pinyin: Bié wàng le bǎ dēng guān le.
examples.english: Don't forget to turn off the lights.

exercises.question: Fill in: ___忘了带钥匙。(Don't forget to bring your key.)
Which sentence means 'Stop wasting food'?
option_pinyin: Bié làng fèi shí wù le.
Méi yǒu làng fèi shí wù.
exercises.correct_pinyin: Bié làng fèi shí wù le.

exercises.question: How does 别 differ from 不要 in reminders?
exercises.correct: 别 is stronger and more direct
options: 别 is stronger and more direct
别 is only used in writing

exercises.question: Translate: 别开着空调睡觉了。
exercises.correct: Stop sleeping with the air conditioner on.
options: Stop sleeping with the air conditioner on.
Turn on the air conditioner to sleep.
The air conditioner was left on while sleeping.
Don't turn on the air conditioner.

quiz.question: Which word means 'to turn off / to close'?
What is the pinyin for 窗户?
Fill in: 请把空调___了。(Please turn off the air conditioner.)
What role does sentence-final 了 play?
quiz.correct: Signals a change of state or new situation
options: Signals a change of state or new situation
Marks a past completed action after a verb

quiz.question: Translate: 随手关灯
quiz.correct: Turn off the lights as you go
options: Turn off the lights as you go

quiz.question: What does 节约用电 mean?
What does 顺便帮我 mean?
quiz.correct: Help me while you're at it
options: Help me while you're at it

quiz.question: Which verb goes with 把 in: 请___空调关了?
What does 开着空调 mean?

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Dà Míng, nǐ yào chū mén le ma?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Duì, wǒ yào qù tú shū guǎn le.
lines.english: Yes, I'm going to the library.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 别忘了把空调关了，很浪费电。
lines.pinyin: Bié wàng le bǎ kōng tiáo guān le, hěn làng fèi diàn.
lines.english: Don't forget to turn off the air conditioner — it wastes a lot of electricity.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好的，我随手把灯也关了。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ suí shǒu bǎ dēng yě guān le.
lines.english: OK, I'll turn off the lights too as I go.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 顺便帮我把窗户关上，谢谢。
lines.pinyin: Shùn biàn bāng wǒ bǎ chuāng hu guān shàng, xiè xie.
lines.english: While you're at it, please close the window for me. Thanks.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没问题，我们要节约用电嘛！
lines.pinyin: Méi wèn tí, wǒ men yào jié yuē yòng diàn ma!
lines.english: No problem — we should save electricity after all!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 小刚，你要上学了，东西带好了吗？
lines.pinyin: Xiǎo Gāng, nǐ yào shàng xué le, dōng xi dài hǎo le ma?
lines.english: Xiaogang, you're going to school — have you got everything?

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Dài hǎo le, wǒ zǒu le.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 等一下！别忘了把空调关了。
lines.pinyin: Děng yí xià! Bié wàng le bǎ kōng tiáo guān le.
lines.english: Wait! Don't forget to turn off the air conditioner.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Ā, duì! Wǒ wàng le. Xiè xie māma.
lines.english: Oh, right! I forgot. Thanks, Mum.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 还有，把窗户关上，外面要下雨了。
lines.pinyin: Hái yǒu, bǎ chuāng hu guān shàng, wài miàn yào xià yǔ le.
lines.english: Also, close the window — it's going to rain outside.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hǎo, guān hǎo le. Wǒ qù shàng xué le!
lines.english: Done, all closed. I'm off to school!
